family_context.preferred_cover_geography: Georgia and Germany, ideally worldwide excluding the US

records.plan_or_entrypoint: International Health Insurance / Global Medical Cover
records.official_source_title: International Health Insurance & Global Medical Cover | Cigna
records.evidence_excerpt: Cigna says its international health insurance serves individuals and families, offers access to medical support in over 200 markets and territories, and provides flexible plans with global medical care essentials.
records.relevance_for_family: Strong expat/family fit; explicitly positioned for families and globally mobile residents.
records.germany_evidence: Not explicitly verified from the extracted landing page, but Germany is within the insurer's stated 200+ markets and territories footprint.
records.georgia_evidence: Not explicitly verified from the extracted landing page; candidate remains relevant because of stated coverage across 200+ markets and territories.
records.worldwide_ex_us_evidence: Global area-of-cover options likely exist, but worldwide excluding US configuration was not directly verified from the public landing page in this run.
uncertainty_notes: Need quote-flow or policy guide review to verify whether Georgia residence is accepted for this family profile.
Need plan documents to confirm worldwide excluding US pricing and underwriting for German citizens resident in Georgia.

records.official_source_title: International Health Insurance for Individuals | Allianz
records.evidence_excerpt: Allianz states its Care international health insurance plans are designed for people who spend long periods overseas and offers dedicated paths for professionals, families, students, and nomads.
records.relevance_for_family: Strong fit for an expatriate family needing long-term international cover.
records.germany_evidence: Germany not explicitly named in the extracted summary, but the product is framed as long-term international cover for people living abroad.
records.georgia_evidence: Georgia not explicitly named in the extracted summary; residence eligibility still requires quote-flow confirmation.
records.worldwide_ex_us_evidence: Likely available through area-of-cover selections, but the extracted page did not directly confirm a worldwide excluding US option.
uncertainty_notes: Need brochure or table of benefits to verify coverage geography options relevant to Georgia and Germany.
Need quote-flow output to confirm eligibility for residents of Georgia.

records.plan_or_entrypoint: Private Health Insurance & Medical Insurance for Individuals and Families
records.official_source_title: Private Health Insurance & Medical Insurance | Bupa Global
records.evidence_excerpt: Bupa Global's official plan selector for individuals and families includes both Georgia and Germany in the residence-country dropdown, indicating public-facing availability exploration for those markets.
records.relevance_for_family: Very strong candidate because the public selector explicitly lists both Georgia and Germany.
records.germany_evidence: Germany appears in the country selector on the official individuals/families plan page.
records.georgia_evidence: Georgia appears in the country selector on the official individuals/families plan page.
records.worldwide_ex_us_evidence: Area-of-cover configuration was not captured from the extracted page; likely quote-flow dependent.
uncertainty_notes: Need actual quote or brochure for Georgia-resident family to confirm available plans and area-of-cover options.
Need pricing and underwriting evidence; public page is mostly selector UI.

records.official_source_title: International Health Insurance Plans: AXA Global Healthcare
records.evidence_excerpt: AXA describes its product as international private health insurance for people living abroad or travelling overseas frequently, with treatment anywhere within the selected region of cover.
records.relevance_for_family: Strong expat-family candidate; explicitly supports people living abroad and has selectable regions of cover.
records.germany_evidence: Germany was not explicitly named in the extracted page text; region-of-cover mechanics suggest possible inclusion but need verification.
records.georgia_evidence: Georgia was not explicitly named in the extracted page text; quote flow or policy wording review is still needed.
records.worldwide_ex_us_evidence: Selected region-of-cover approach suggests a possible worldwide excluding US configuration, but this was not directly confirmed in the extracted text.
uncertainty_notes: Need quote-flow or brochure to verify exact geography bands including Georgia and Germany.
Need family pricing and underwriting specifics.

records.official_source_title: Long-term expat international health insurance | APRIL International
records.evidence_excerpt: APRIL positions this as long-term international health insurance for expatriates and globally mobile individuals staying abroad longer than 12 months, with worldwide cover depending on area of cover. The country selector excerpt includes Germany.
records.relevance_for_family: Strong fit for long-term expat family discovery.
records.germany_evidence: Germany appears in the extracted country-of-coverage selector examples.
records.georgia_evidence: Georgia was not visible in the extracted examples; likely present in the full selector but not verified from extracted text.
records.worldwide_ex_us_evidence: APRIL explicitly states worldwide cover depending on selected geographic area, but a specific worldwide excluding US option was not captured verbatim.
uncertainty_notes: Need full quote-flow or benefits guide to verify Georgia selection and geography bands.
Need pricing and family underwriting details.
